choices: extend host behavior at hook points without subclassing the host
items.explain: Callbacks register hook objects on a host component.

items.prompt: A typical drive hook order is…
choices: pre hooks → host body → post hooks
post hooks → host body → pre hooks
items.explain: Pre runs before the operation; post runs after.

items.prompt: A pre_drive callback is often used to…
choices: modify or inject faults on the item before the host drives
items.explain: Pre hooks can change the transaction before drive.

items.prompt: A registered but disabled callback is skipped when the host runs its hooks.
items.explain: Enable/disable controls whether a registered cb fires.
